subspaces.name: Distributed State Estimation
subspaces.description: Real-time estimation of grid variables (voltage, phase angle, frequency) using geographically distributed sensors and peer-to-peer or hierarchical communication, resilient to communication delays and partial observability.
seed_papers: IEEE Transactions on Power Systems, 'Distributed Dynamic State Estimation Using Synchrophasor Measurements', 2018
Automatica, 'Consensus+Innovations Approach to Distributed State Estimation', 2015
subspaces.probe_query: synchrophasor PMU network consensus-based estimation Kalman filtering distributed observability analysis edge computing power systems

subspaces.name: Adaptive Protection Coordination
subspaces.description: Protection schemes that dynamically reconfigure relay settings and coordination logic in response to topology changes, DER penetration, and fault characteristics—enabling selective isolation without overreach in highly dynamic grids.
keywords: fault location isolation and service restoration (FLISR)
seed_papers: IEEE PES Task Force Report on Adaptive Protection for Distribution Systems, 2021
IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid, 'Multi-Agent Adaptive Protection Framework for Active Distribution Networks', 2020
subspaces.probe_query: intelligent electronic device (IED) fault location isolation and service restoration (FLISR) multi-agent protection impedance-based adaptive setting DER-integrated protection IEC 61850 GOOSE reconfiguration

subspaces.name: Autonomous Inverter Control
subspaces.description: Control architectures enabling inverters (especially BESS and renewables) to autonomously establish voltage/frequency reference, provide inertia emulation, and sustain stable islanded or weak-grid operation without synchronous machines.
seed_papers: Nature Energy, 'Grid-Forming Inverters: A Critical Asset for the Energy Transition', 2022
IEEE Transactions on Power Electronics, 'A Unified Framework for Grid-Forming Converters', 2021
subspaces.probe_query: virtual oscillator control (VOC) synchronverter droop-free control black-start capability inertia emulation short-circuit ratio (SCR) resilience

subspaces.name: Hierarchical Multi-Time-Scale Control
subspaces.description: Integrated control architecture spanning millisecond (stability), second (AGC/primary frequency), minute (economic dispatch), and hour (unit commitment) timescales with explicit interfaces, stability guarantees, and cross-layer optimization.
seed_papers: Proceedings of the IEEE, 'Hierarchical Control of Microgrids and Active Distribution Networks', 2020
IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid, 'Multi-Timescale Optimal Power Flow for Autonomous Grids', 2021
subspaces.probe_query: model predictive control (MPC) hierarchy co-simulation platforms (e.g., HELICS) time-scale separation theorem real-time digital simulator (RTDS) integration stability-constrained economic dispatch

subspaces.name: Cyber-Physical Security Orchestration
aliases: 电网信息物理安全编排
subspaces.description: End-to-end security frameworks co-designing intrusion detection, attack-resilient state estimation, secure consensus protocols, and fail-operational control reconfiguration under adversarial cyber conditions.
seed_papers: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing, 'Secure Distributed State Estimation Against False Data Injection', 2019
ACM Transactions on Management Information Systems, 'Cyber-Physical Resilience in Autonomous Grids', 2022
subspaces.probe_query: false data injection (FDI) defense secure state estimation zero-trust architecture power systems control-theoretic security metrics attack impact quantification IEEE 1686-2022 compliance

subspaces.name: Digital Twin–Enabled Predictive Control
subspaces.description: Tightly coupled real-time simulation and physical grid assets, enabling predictive what-if analysis, closed-loop model-in-the-loop control, and automated scenario-aware setpoint optimization.
seed_papers: IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid, 'Digital Twin for Real-Time Grid Control: Architecture and Validation', 2023
CIGRE Session Paper 39-207, 'Digital Twin Applications in TSO Operations', 2022
subspaces.probe_query: model fidelity calibration OPAL-RT/RTDS-DT integration physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) digital twin lifecycle management ISO-55000 alignment data-model fusion

subspaces.name: Market-Integrated Autonomous Dispatch
subspaces.description: Control mechanisms that embed market signals (prices, bids, constraints) directly into local decision-making at DER, microgrid, and substation levels—enabling self-optimizing dispatch aligned with wholesale/retail markets and regulatory rules.
seed_papers: IEEE Transactions on Power Systems, 'Transactive Control for Autonomous Distribution System Operation', 2021
Energy Policy, 'Regulatory Enablers for Market-Integrated Autonomous Grids', 2022
subspaces.probe_query: transactive energy distributed optimal power flow (D-OPF) blockchain-enabled clearing ISO/RTO interface standards FERC Order 2222 compliance bid-based autonomous control

subspaces.name: Resilience-Aware Restoration Planning
subspaces.description: Autonomous, real-time generation of post-fault restoration sequences—including black-start unit selection, path re-energization order, and load pickup sequencing—using topology-aware graph algorithms and multi-objective optimization.
seed_papers: IEEE Transactions on Power Systems, 'Autonomous Restoration Path Planning Using Graph Neural Networks', 2022
IEEE PES White Paper on Grid Resilience, 2021
subspaces.probe_query: graph partitioning for restoration black-start capability mapping restoration time minimization N-1/N-2 contingency-aware planning IEEE C37.118.2 synchronization recovery

subspaces.name: Edge-Native Control Middleware
subspaces.description: Standardized, lightweight software stacks running on field devices (RTUs, IEDs, inverters) that abstract hardware, host modular control apps (e.g., GFM, FLISR), support over-the-air updates, and enforce deterministic real-time execution.
seed_papers: IEEE Standards Association, 'P2030.7 Draft Standard for Grid Edge Control Systems', 2023
ACM SIGBED Review, 'Operating Systems for Autonomous Grid Edge Devices', 2022
subspaces.probe_query: IEC 62559 use case modeling open control platform (OCP) AUTOSAR-like for power systems containerized control apps deterministic Linux (PREEMPT_RT) IEEE P2030.5-2020 extensions

subspaces.name: Human-Autonomy Teaming Interfaces
subspaces.description: Design and validation of human-centered interfaces that convey autonomy intent, uncertainty, trade-offs, and fallback options—supporting supervisory trust, timely intervention, and shared situational awareness during autonomous grid operation.
seed_papers: IEEE Transactions on Human-Machine Systems, 'Explainability Requirements for Autonomous Grid Controllers', 2022
CIGRE Technical Brochure 875, 'Human Factors in Autonomous Grid Operation', 2023
subspaces.probe_query: XAI for power systems trust calibration metrics control transparency design operator workload assessment ISO/IEC 9241-210 compliance HMI for grid control rooms

coverage_plan.recommendation: Confirm priority subspaces with the user before running ZhiZhi, then search selected subspaces independently.

user_interaction.question: Select the subspaces to prioritize before ZhiZhi imports papers. You can also add custom subspaces.

options.label: Distributed State Estimation
options.description: Real-time estimation of grid variables (voltage, phase angle, frequency) using geographically distributed sensors and peer-to-peer or hierarchical communication, resilient to communication delays and partial observability.

options.label: Adaptive Protection Coordination
options.description: Protection schemes that dynamically reconfigure relay settings and coordination logic in response to topology changes, DER penetration, and fault characteristics—enabling selective isolation without overreach in highly dynamic grids.
keywords: fault location isolation and service restoration (FLISR)

options.label: Autonomous Inverter Control
options.description: Control architectures enabling inverters (especially BESS and renewables) to autonomously establish voltage/frequency reference, provide inertia emulation, and sustain stable islanded or weak-grid operation without synchronous machines.

options.label: Hierarchical Multi-Time-Scale Control
options.description: Integrated control architecture spanning millisecond (stability), second (AGC/primary frequency), minute (economic dispatch), and hour (unit commitment) timescales with explicit interfaces, stability guarantees, and cross-layer optimization.

options.label: Cyber-Physical Security Orchestration
options.description: End-to-end security frameworks co-designing intrusion detection, attack-resilient state estimation, secure consensus protocols, and fail-operational control reconfiguration under adversarial cyber conditions.

options.label: Digital Twin–Enabled Predictive Control
options.description: Tightly coupled real-time simulation and physical grid assets, enabling predictive what-if analysis, closed-loop model-in-the-loop control, and automated scenario-aware setpoint optimization.

options.label: Market-Integrated Autonomous Dispatch
options.description: Control mechanisms that embed market signals (prices, bids, constraints) directly into local decision-making at DER, microgrid, and substation levels—enabling self-optimizing dispatch aligned with wholesale/retail markets and regulatory rules.

options.label: Resilience-Aware Restoration Planning
options.description: Autonomous, real-time generation of post-fault restoration sequences—including black-start unit selection, path re-energization order, and load pickup sequencing—using topology-aware graph algorithms and multi-objective optimization.

options.label: Edge-Native Control Middleware
options.description: Standardized, lightweight software stacks running on field devices (RTUs, IEDs, inverters) that abstract hardware, host modular control apps (e.g., GFM, FLISR), support over-the-air updates, and enforce deterministic real-time execution.

options.label: Human-Autonomy Teaming Interfaces
options.description: Design and validation of human-centered interfaces that convey autonomy intent, uncertainty, trade-offs, and fallback options—supporting supervisory trust, timely intervention, and shared situational awareness during autonomous grid operation.

user_interaction.continue_with: Pass subspace_map_id plus selected_subfields, or pass option labels as focus_branches to run_zhizhi_literature_analysis.
